chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1687 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 6671/25 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 6672/25 4.For hearing of main case 14-10-2025 Mr. Ghulam Abbas, Advocate for petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that for redressal of his grievance, the petitioner will exhaust alternate remedy available under the law by approaching the proper forum. Order accordingly. This petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
